id.about: Mahasiswa Teknik Komputer yang termotivasi dengan pengalaman kepemimpinan organisasi, koordinasi proyek, dan pengembangan web. Aktif ikut serta dalam organisasi mahasiswa dan kegiatan sukarela, menangani fundraising, program ekonomi kreatif, dan bimbingan mahasiswa baru. Berpengalaman membuat antarmuka web dan mendukung program pemberdayaan digital untuk UMKM lokal.

hero.name: Hi, I'm Parulian Johannes
hero.subtitle: Computer Engineering student — Web Developer & Data Enthusiast. Experienced building responsive UIs and doing data analysis.

en.about: A motivated Computer Engineering student with experience in organizational leadership, project coordination, and web development. Actively involved in student organizations and volunteer work, handling responsibilities such as fundraising, creative economics programs, and mentoring new students. Experienced in building web interfaces and supporting digital empowerment programs for local SMEs.
